title: Technology Prize submission package: live 3-min demo + backtest data + AI-native novelty writeup + setup diagram, ready by 26 Jun 22:00
source: Official 'AI Engine x Syphonix MoMQ Hack - Technology Prize' pack received 2026-06-21 (Downloads/AI Engine x Syphonix MoMQ Hack - Technology Prize.docx); summarized in memory reference_tech_prize_criteria.
why: The Technology Prize is judged on four EQUAL 25% criteria - Future Potential, P&L Placement (does it work?), Creativity/Uniqueness, Pitching Quality - NOT pure architecture. Format is a 3-min product demo + 2-min Q&A that must show the real product in action WITH BACKTEST DATA. Submission window is 24 Jun 22:00 -> 26 Jun 22:00 BST (the deadline coincides with the trading close). Requires a short novelty description in the 'AI-native way' + source code; setup diagram/slides optional. We need this package pre-assembled so it can ship the moment we clear the top-100 cut on 24 Jun, not scrambled afterward.
value_rationale: H: this is THE concrete deliverable for the $10k main track ($5k/3k/2k to top 3). Gated only on reaching top-100; high payoff and largely within our control given the system already exists.
scope: Script + record (and be able to run live) a 3-minute demo of the product in action.
Assemble backtest-data exhibits to show during the demo (PSR/DSR, equity curve, walk-forward) - must be visible per the rules.
Write the short 'novelty of your setup in the AI-native way' description.
Produce the technology setup diagram (optional but recommended).
Map our story explicitly onto the 4x25% criteria (Future Potential, P&L Placement, Creativity, Pitching).
Stage everything so it can be submitted in the 24-26 Jun window without last-minute work.
recommendation: Lead the deck/demo with the autonomous multi-agent research-and-execution system (the real edge), tie P&L Placement to the barbell/survival-book result, and rehearse the 3+2 min format tightly. Pre-assemble before the 24 Jun cut.
out_of_scope: Does not decide the Stage-2 aggression rung or any CEO-reserved strategy posture; those are tracked elsewhere.

history.reason: Surfaced from the official Technology Prize pack review (2026-06-21).
